name: agent-booster-pack-whiteboard
description: ABP Pi conversation guard: one whiteboarding question at a time plus final value reflection after implementation.

scripts.install-ext: mkdir -p ~/.pi/agent/extensions && ln -sfn "$(pwd)" ~/.pi/agent/extensions/agent-booster-pack-whiteboard && echo 'Installed to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/agent-booster-pack-whiteboard -- run /reload in Pi to activate'

author: Alastair Dawson
